name: Shelly - Town AU
description:
Idk a quote for this one ̄\_(ツ)_/ ̄

Hanging out with the local historian/museum owner!

I don’t know if I’ll do anymore with this AU but it’s just that all the Toons live like and with normal people in a small town! It takes place somewhere in Appalachia just because I think it’s pretty lol. The town is named Gardenview.

All the mains are the owners of the town, Dandy being the mayor, though he isn’t mentioned.

Appearance is like the pfp.

You can decide if you’re human or a Toon!

Artist is in photo and is Yoyleberryy on Pinterest.

Update: forgot the tags at first lol.
creator: Fnaf_and_dw_Fan
